Class AbstractBrush

java.lang.Object
brush.AbstractBrush
All Implemented Interfaces:
Paintable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractSpray, EraserBrush, FountainBrush, HighlightBrush, PencilBrush
public abstract class AbstractBrush extends Object implements Paintable
Base class for all brushes used in WigglyPaint.

Handles shared behaviors such as:

  • Size computation based on movement speed
  • Interpolated stamping along continuous strokes
  • Random shape variation for organic brush textures
  • Painting on multiple layers (for wiggle effect)
Subclasses must implement stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) to define their own dab shape.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AbstractBrush(int baseSize)
    Constructs a brush with default color and no speed scaling.
    AbstractBrush(int baseSize, double speedScale)
    Constructs a brush with base size and speed scaling.
    AbstractBrush(int baseSize, int colorIndex, double speedScale)
    Constructs a brush with full control over color and scaling.

    Resets the previous stroke point so the next drag event starts a new line.
    protected boolean
    shape(int dx, int dy, int r)
    Randomly selects one of several shape modes: Perfect circle Wobbly jittered circle Half-tone circle (checker pattern) Ellipse (calligraphy effect) This gives brushes a natural, varied texture.

    Places a single “dab” of the brush shape onto the canvas.

    stampLine(CanvasData canvas, double x0, double y0, double x1, double y1, int size, int colorIndex, int layer)
    Draws a smooth line between the previous point (x0, y0) and the new point (x1, y1) by placing interpolated dabs.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • baseSize

      protected int baseSize
      Base brush size before speed scaling is applied.

    • speedScale

      protected double speedScale
      Strength of size reduction as speed increases. Higher values → thinner stroke while moving fast.

    • colorIndex

      protected int colorIndex
      Index into CanvasData color palette.

    • lastX

      protected double lastX
      Last stroke position, used for line interpolation.

    • lastY

      protected double lastY

    • random

      protected final Random random
      Shared random generator for shape jitter / variations.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractBrush

      public AbstractBrush(int baseSize)
      Constructs a brush with default color and no speed scaling.
      Parameters:
      baseSize - base stroke size

    • AbstractBrush

      public AbstractBrush(int baseSize, double speedScale)
      Constructs a brush with base size and speed scaling.
      Parameters:
      baseSize - stroke size at zero speed
      speedScale - size reduction factor when moving fast

    • AbstractBrush

      public AbstractBrush(int baseSize, int colorIndex, double speedScale)
      Constructs a brush with full control over color and scaling.
      Parameters:
      baseSize - initial size
      colorIndex - color index in CanvasData palette
      speedScale - speed-based size reduction factor

  • Method Details

    • stamp

      protected abstract void stamp(CanvasData canvas, double x, double y, int size, int colorIndex, int layer)
      Places a single “dab” of the brush shape onto the canvas. Subclasses define the exact pixel pattern.
      Parameters:
      canvas - target canvas
      x - x position
      y - y position
      size - computed brush size
      colorIndex - color to apply
      layer - canvas layer index (wiggle uses multiple)

    • stampLine

      protected void stampLine(CanvasData canvas, double x0, double y0, double x1, double y1, int size, int colorIndex, int layer)
      Draws a smooth line between the previous point (x0, y0) and the new point (x1, y1) by placing interpolated dabs.
      Parameters:
      canvas - the canvas to write to
      x0 - previous position (may be NaN)
      y0 - previous position (may be NaN)
      x1 - new x position
      y1 - new y position
      size - computed brush size
      colorIndex - color index
      layer - canvas layer index

    • shape

      protected boolean shape(int dx, int dy, int r)
      Randomly selects one of several shape modes:
      • Perfect circle
      • Wobbly jittered circle
      • Half-tone circle (checker pattern)
      • Ellipse (calligraphy effect)
      This gives brushes a natural, varied texture.
      Parameters:
      dx - horizontal offset from center
      dy - vertical offset from center
      r - radius
      Returns:
      true if the pixel should be drawn

    • computeSize

      protected int computeSize(double speed)
      Computes the brush size based on movement speed.

      Uses a shallow log curve to avoid aggressive shrinking.

      Parameters:
      speed - recent movement speed from CanvasController
      Returns:
      final pixel radius (min = 1)

    • resetStroke

      public void resetStroke()
      Resets the previous stroke point so the next drag event starts a new line.
      Specified by:
      resetStroke in interface Paintable

    • paintOnEveryLayer

      public void paintOnEveryLayer(CanvasData canvas, double x, double y, double speed)
      Paints the brush stroke on every wiggle layer.

      WigglyPaint uses 2 layers:

      • Layer 1: main stroke
      • Layer 2: slightly offset wiggle clone
      Specified by:
      paintOnEveryLayer in interface Paintable
      Parameters:
      canvas - the canvas containing pixel layers
      x - current x
      y - current y
      speed - movement speed for size scaling

    • getBaseSize

      public int getBaseSize()
      Returns:
      the default brush size (before speed scaling)

    • getColorIndex

      public int getColorIndex()
      Returns:
      the palette index of the active brush color
